about.title: Data-driven, user-centric, curious.
about.whoAmIDescription: I build intelligent products that connect math, code, and people. I work in ML, NLP, recommendation systems, and AI-powered web apps.
about.coreSkillsSubtitle: What I use to craft ideas.

mlops.title: Churn Prediction MLOps Platform
mlops.description: End-to-end MLOps platform for customer churn prediction with automated training, MLflow experiment tracking, FastAPI inference, Streamlit dashboard, ELK Stack, and Dockerized CI/CD pipeline.

agriHope.title: Agri-Hope Marketplace
agriHope.description: Full-stack marketplace for small farmers with an integrated AI assistant.

breastCancer.title: Breast Cancer Prediction Platform
breastCancer.description: End-to-end ML platform for breast cancer prediction developed using CRISP-DM methodology with model interpretability via SHAP, FastAPI backend, and interactive Next.js frontend.
features: ML Models: Logistic Regression, SVM, Random Forest, MLP, XGBoost
Explainable AI (XAI) using SHAP for prediction interpretation

restaurantRating.title: Restaurant Rating Analysis Dashboard
restaurantRating.description: Interactive Power BI dashboard analyzing restaurant satisfaction, customer profiles, cuisine preferences, pricing, parking availability, and transportation methods. The project also includes Python-based machine learning visuals to study the factors influencing overall ratings and cuisine prediction.
features: Built interactive dashboards for director, quality manager, marketing, client, and machine learning views.
Created DAX measures for satisfaction, dissatisfaction, positive ratings, food satisfaction, service satisfaction, and offer-preference adequacy.
Analyzed customer behavior by age, budget, marital status, drink level, smoker status, preferred cuisine, and transportation method.
Integrated Python visuals using pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib, and seaborn for feature importance and rating prediction.

firmaa.title: FIRMAA – Plateforme d’agriculture intelligente
firmaa.description: Plateforme d’agriculture intelligente basée sur l’IA, combinant web, mobile, IoT et machine learning pour aider les agriculteurs à optimiser l’irrigation, détecter les maladies des cultures et des volailles, classifier les insectes nuisibles et suivre la santé du bétail.
features: Agent d’irrigation autonome basé sur l’humidité du sol, la météo, les besoins des cultures et les données capteurs
Détection des maladies des cultures et des poulets à partir d’images, avec support IA hors ligne sur mobile
Prédiction de la santé du bétail à partir des symptômes et classification des insectes par le son
Dashboard web, application mobile, vue 3D de la ferme et monitoring IoT en temps réel
